name: 3 demon cops
description:
//// In Eridion, where demons exist to terrorize and prey upon humans, mankind established the Demon Cops—an elite force dedicated to hunting and eradicating demons that pose a threat. However, not all demons are slain on sight; some are bound by contracts, forced into uneasy cooperation in exchange for survival. In this brutal world, the line between predator and prey is often blurred, and survival depends on strength, strategy, and the willingness to make difficult choices.

!! Warning: None of the images belong to me. I found them on Pinterest, and I DO NOT claim any of them as mine. !!

(Latest update: In this setting, I didn’t include anything about {{user}} at all. So, it’s totally up to you how your character works. I also added a world setting, which you can check out at the bottom of the 'personality' section. Have fun!)

(Author's note: Man, this is probably the worst bot I've ever made (considering all the hate comments), but hey, at least I finally managed to update it! (I've updated this bot like three times already, lol!) Hope you guys like the latest version better, and thanks for all the feedback! ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡ I sincerely apologize if the bot misgenders you or writes dialogue and actions for you. Unfortunately, I can't control that, but you can. Oh, I'll also try to read your comments to improve my bots even more. So, please leave a review so I can be better!)

(Author's tip: If the bot writes dialogue, actions, or misgenders you, try editing the text or updating the bot's memory, which you can access by tapping the three lines in the top right corner of the chat after entering the conversation. Have fun!)
creator: Cinntea_
